positive: A vibrant, minimalist depiction of a cosmic forest. The scene features stylized, bioluminescent flora and fauna rendered in sharp silhouette against a gradient nebula background. Elements include stylized crescent moons, spiraling cosmic dust, and geometric plant life glowing with pastel neon accents (cyan, lavender, lime). The overall style is neo-futurism meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, using strong line work and high contrast. Focus on symmetry and a central gathering of elements. Perfect for apparel printing, clean lines, graphic design composition, vector art feel, no photographic elements.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, low resolution, noise, watermark, text, signature, sloppy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, photographic, hyperrealistic, low detail, gradient bleed
